name: source-identity-proof
command:
bash -lc $'set -euo pipefail
    out=".agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening/tests/source-identity-proof.json"
    version=$(tr -d "[:space:]" < VERSION)
    chart_app=$(awk -F: "/^appVersion:/ {gsub(/[ \"'\\r]/, \"\", \$2); print \$2}" deploy/helm/charts/vexa/Chart.yaml)
    chart_version=$(awk -F: "/^version:/ {gsub(/[ \"'\\r]/, \"\", \$2); print \$2}" deploy/helm/charts/vexa/Chart.yaml)
    test "$version" = "0.10.6.2.1"
    test "$chart_app" = "$version"
    test "$chart_version" = "0.10.6+2.1"
    grep -q "NEXT_PUBLIC_VEXA_OSS_VERSION: \\${VEXA_VERSION:-}" deploy/compose/docker-compose.yml
    grep -q "COPY VERSION /repo/VERSION" services/dashboard/Dockerfile
    grep -q "COPY deploy/helm/charts/vexa/Chart.yaml" services/dashboard/Dockerfile
    grep -q "npm run assert-release-version" services/dashboard/Dockerfile
    grep -q "COPY VERSION /repo/VERSION" deploy/lite/Dockerfile.lite
    grep -q "npm run assert-release-version" deploy/lite/Dockerfile.lite
    jq -n --arg version "$version" --arg chart_app "$chart_app" --arg chart_version "$chart_version" \
      --arg compose_dashboard_arg "NEXT_PUBLIC_VEXA_OSS_VERSION defaults to empty VEXA_VERSION fallback" \
      --arg dashboard_dockerfile "copies VERSION and Chart.yaml, sets VEXA_REPO_ROOT, runs assert-release-version" \
      --arg lite_dockerfile "copies VERSION and Chart.yaml, sets VEXA_REPO_ROOT, runs assert-release-version" \
      "{status:\"pass\", version:\$version, chart_app_version:\$chart_app, chart_version:\$chart_version, compose_dashboard_arg:\$compose_dashboard_arg, dashboard_dockerfile:\$dashboard_dockerfile, lite_dockerfile:\$lite_dockerfile}" > "$out"
    jq . "$out'
hypothesis: VERSION, Helm appVersion, Compose dashboard build args, and Dockerfiles expose one coherent release identity.

name: source-identity-proof-retry
command:
bash -lc $'set -euo pipefail
    out=".agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening/tests/source-identity-proof.json"
    version=$(tr -d "[:space:]" < VERSION)
    chart_app=$(awk -F: "/^appVersion:/ {gsub(/[ \\\"\\r]/, \"\", \$2); print \$2}" deploy/helm/charts/vexa/Chart.yaml)
    chart_version=$(awk -F: "/^version:/ {gsub(/[ \\\"\\r]/, \"\", \$2); print \$2}" deploy/helm/charts/vexa/Chart.yaml)
    test "$version" = "0.10.6.2.1"
    test "$chart_app" = "$version"
    test "$chart_version" = "0.10.6+2.1"
    grep -Fq "NEXT_PUBLIC_VEXA_OSS_VERSION: \${VEXA_VERSION:-}" deploy/compose/docker-compose.yml
    grep -Fq "COPY VERSION /repo/VERSION" services/dashboard/Dockerfile
    grep -Fq "COPY deploy/helm/charts/vexa/Chart.yaml" services/dashboard/Dockerfile
    grep -Fq "npm run assert-release-version" services/dashboard/Dockerfile
    grep -Fq "COPY VERSION /repo/VERSION" deploy/lite/Dockerfile.lite
    grep -Fq "npm run assert-release-version" deploy/lite/Dockerfile.lite
    jq -n --arg version "$version" --arg chart_app "$chart_app" --arg chart_version "$chart_version" \
      --arg compose_dashboard_arg "NEXT_PUBLIC_VEXA_OSS_VERSION defaults to empty VEXA_VERSION fallback" \
      --arg dashboard_dockerfile "copies VERSION and Chart.yaml, sets VEXA_REPO_ROOT, runs assert-release-version" \
      --arg lite_dockerfile "copies VERSION and Chart.yaml, sets VEXA_REPO_ROOT, runs assert-release-version" \
      "{status:\"pass\", version:\$version, chart_app_version:\$chart_app, chart_version:\$chart_version, compose_dashboard_arg:\$compose_dashboard_arg, dashboard_dockerfile:\$dashboard_dockerfile, lite_dockerfile:\$lite_dockerfile}" > "$out"
    jq . "$out"'
hypothesis: VERSION, Helm appVersion, Compose dashboard build args, and Dockerfiles expose one coherent release identity.

name: dashboard-release-version-synthetic
command:
bash -lc $'set -euo pipefail
    trap "rm -rf services/dashboard/.next services/dashboard/src/lib/release-version.generated.json" EXIT
    rm -rf services/dashboard/.next services/dashboard/src/lib/release-version.generated.json
    VEXA_REPO_ROOT="$PWD" node services/dashboard/scripts/generate-release-version.js
    cp services/dashboard/src/lib/release-version.generated.json .agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening/tests/dashboard-release-version.generated.json
    mkdir -p services/dashboard/.next/static/pack7
    printf "%s\n" "window.__vexaRelease=\"0.10.6.2.1\";" > services/dashboard/.next/static/pack7/release-proof.js
    VEXA_REPO_ROOT="$PWD" EXPECTED_VEXA_OSS_VERSION=0.10.6.2.1 node services/dashboard/scripts/assert-release-version.js
    cat .agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening/tests/dashboard-release-version.generated.json'
hypothesis: Dashboard release-version generator rejects drift and assert-release-version can find 0.10.6.2.1 in compiled static output.

name: meeting-api-security-headers-pytest
hypothesis: VNC CSP allows same-host dashboard embedding while non-VNC routes retain X-Frame-Options DENY.

name: meeting-api-security-headers-pytest-py311
command: bash -lc $'set -euo pipefail\n    PYTHONPATH=services/meeting-api uv run --python 3.11 --with pytest --with "fastapi>=0.128.8" python -m pytest services/meeting-api/tests/test_security_headers.py -q'
hypothesis: Security header tests pass under the service-supported Python >=3.11 runtime.

name: meeting-api-security-headers-pytest-py311-retry
command: bash -lc $'set -euo pipefail\n    PYTHONPATH=services/meeting-api uv run --python 3.11 --with pytest --with pytest-asyncio --with "fastapi>=0.128.8" python -m pytest services/meeting-api/tests/test_security_headers.py -q'
hypothesis: Security header tests pass under Python 3.11 with pytest async plugin loaded.

name: meeting-api-security-headers-pytest-py311-confcutdir
command: bash -lc $'set -euo pipefail\n    PYTHONPATH=services/meeting-api uv run --python 3.11 --with pytest --with "fastapi>=0.128.8" python -m pytest --confcutdir=/tmp services/meeting-api/tests/test_security_headers.py -q'
hypothesis: Security header product test passes under Python 3.11 without loading unrelated integration fixtures.

name: meeting-api-security-headers-pytest-py311-requirements
command: bash -lc $'set -euo pipefail\n    PYTHONPATH=services/meeting-api uv run --python 3.11 --with-requirements services/meeting-api/requirements.txt --with pytest --with pytest-asyncio python -m pytest services/meeting-api/tests/test_security_headers.py -q'
hypothesis: Security header product test passes under Python 3.11 with meeting-api requirements installed.

name: helm-lint-template
command:
bash -lc $'set -euo pipefail
    helm lint deploy/helm/charts/vexa
    helm template pack7 deploy/helm/charts/vexa --set global.imageTag=0.10.6.2.1 > .agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening/tests/helm-template.yaml
    grep -Fq "vexaai/vexa-bot:0.10.6.2.1" .agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening/tests/helm-template.yaml
    grep -F "vexaai/vexa-bot:0.10.6.2.1" .agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening/tests/helm-template.yaml | head -5'
hypothesis: Helm accepts the 0.10.6+2.1 chart SemVer and renders the bot image helper with the pack image tag.

name: compose-config-render
command:
bash -lc $'set -euo pipefail
    export COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME=vexa_0_10_6x_pack_7_release_identity_packaging_hardening
    export IMAGE_TAG=0.10.6.2.1
    export VEXA_VERSION=0.10.6.2.1
    export VEXA_RELEASE_DATE=2026-05-23
    export BROWSER_IMAGE=vexaai/vexa-bot:0.10.6.2.1
    export AGENT_IMAGE=vexaai/vexa-agent:0.10.6.2.1
    export CLAUDE_CREDENTIALS_PATH=/tmp/vexa-pack7-claude.json
    export CLAUDE_JSON_PATH=/tmp/vexa-pack7-claude.json
    export DASHBOARD_HOST_PORT=44460
    export API_GATEWAY_HOST_PORT=44461
    export POSTGRES_HOST_PORT=44464
    export MINIO_HOST_PORT=44465
    export MINIO_CONSOLE_HOST_PORT=44466
    export MCP_HOST_PORT=44467
    docker compose -f deploy/compose/docker-compose.yml config > .agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening/compose/compose-config.yaml
    grep -Fq "NEXT_PUBLIC_VEXA_OSS_VERSION: 0.10.6.2.1" .agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening/compose/compose-config.yaml
    grep -Fq "vexaai/dashboard:0.10.6.2.1" .agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening/compose/compose-config.yaml
    grep -Fq "published: \"44460\"" .agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening/compose/compose-config.yaml
    grep -Fq "published: \"44461\"" .agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening/compose/compose-config.yaml
    grep -E "NEXT_PUBLIC_VEXA_OSS_VERSION|vexaai/dashboard:0.10.6.2.1|published: \"4446[01]\"" .agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening/compose/compose-config.yaml'
hypothesis: Compose renders the pack image/version identity and allocated dashboard/gateway ports without deploying default ports.

name: lite-identity-proof
command:
bash -lc $'set -euo pipefail
    out=.agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening/lite/lite-identity-proof.json
    grep -Fq "COPY VERSION /repo/VERSION" deploy/lite/Dockerfile.lite
    grep -Fq "COPY deploy/helm/charts/vexa/Chart.yaml /repo/deploy/helm/charts/vexa/Chart.yaml" deploy/lite/Dockerfile.lite
    grep -Fq "ENV VEXA_REPO_ROOT=/repo" deploy/lite/Dockerfile.lite
    grep -Fq "npm run build && npm run assert-release-version" deploy/lite/Dockerfile.lite
    jq -n "{status:\"pass\", lite_gate:\"source-level Lite identity proof; image runtime validation deferred until product-pack stitching per epic gate\", checks:[\"COPY VERSION /repo/VERSION\",\"COPY Chart.yaml into /repo\",\"ENV VEXA_REPO_ROOT=/repo\",\"npm run assert-release-version after build\"]}" > "$out"
    jq . "$out"'
hypothesis: Lite Dockerfile embeds the same VERSION/Chart identity and runs the dashboard release assertion during image build.

name: npm-lock-consistency-dry-run
command:
bash -lc $'set -euo pipefail
    npm --prefix packages/transcript-rendering ci --ignore-scripts --dry-run
    npm --prefix services/dashboard ci --ignore-scripts --dry-run
    npm --prefix services/vexa-bot ci --ignore-scripts --dry-run'
hypothesis: Changed npm package manifests remain consistent with their committed lockfiles.

name: hardenloop-pack7
command:
bash -lc $'set -euo pipefail
    out=.agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening/hardenloop/run
    console=.agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening/hardenloop/console.log
    config=/home/dima/dev/vexa-agents-pack-pipeline-strategy/.agents/skills/hardenloop/references/vexa-release.toml
    set +e
    /home/dima/dev/vexa-i-adversarial-harness/.venv/bin/hardenloop release . --mode oss-release --cycles 1 --fix none --out "$out" --config "$config" --timeout-seconds 180 > "$console" 2>&1
    status=$?
    set -e
    tail -n 80 "$console"
    exit "$status"'
hypothesis: Hardenloop can assess the PACK 7 release identity and dependency-hardening diff without applying fixes.
